# Search for People, Businesses & Places in the UK

192.com gives you more information about people, businesses, and places in the UK than any other directory.

![People Search](https://statics.192.com/images/ont/people-search.gif?_=a794d581-d8fd-495b-8a27-06ce8fea2aa5)Search People

Name:

Location:

![Electoral Roll 2025](https://statics.192.com/images/ont/ER25_logo.gif?_=a794d581-d8fd-495b-8a27-06ce8fea2aa5)

### Electoral Roll 2025 is now here

Latest edited Electoral Roll now online, with millions of new records.

[Find out more »](https://www.192.com/people/electoral-roll/ "Find people in the 2025 Electoral Roll")

### Personal Checks new

Check any name and address for property ownership, insolvency, county court judgments and mortality.

[Find out more »](https://www.192.com/people/personal-checks/ "Personal Checks")

### Ownership & Occupier Lookup new

Instantly discover property owners in England and Wales, and occupier information across the UK. Check any address for quick insights.

[Search now »](https://www.192.com/places/owners-occupants-lookup/ "Ownership & Occupier Lookup")

### Background Reports

Protect yourself from fraud. Find out the truth with a background report.

[Find out more »](https://www.192.com/people/background-report/ "Background Reports")

Directory Enquiries

Search our online telephone directory for free and save a fortune on 118 calls.

[Search now »](https://www.192.com/people/directory-enquiries/ "Search directory for free")

### Places

Search places within UK. To find out more about an area, type in a location.

[Search now »](https://www.192.com/places/ "Places")

### Businesses

Search for UK businesses in our unique collection of multiple data sources.

[Search now »](https://www.192.com/businesses/ "Businesses")

192.com is proud to support the British Red Cross in reconnecting and reuniting families. [Click here](https://www.redcross.org.uk/get-help/find-missing-family "Find Missing Family") to find out more about their work.
